sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n35051" key="e)nau/gasma" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐναύγ-ασμα</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ατος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n35051.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">illumination</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἐ θεῖον</foreign> ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0018.tlg001:88" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">88</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
